repo.description: Code for High-Capacity Expert Binary Networks (ICLR 2021).

terms.context_snippet: This code provides the core components for building networks based on the architectures and Expert Binary Convolutional Block introduced in the _High-Capacity Expert Binary Networks_ paper. You can find the full version of the paper [here](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2010.03558).
